title: Maintain OSS hygiene for public Skillbox artifacts
description: Public tracking seed for OSS readiness. Private operator history was moved out of the public Beads export during the 2026-06-24 cleanup. Keep public docs, generated examples, runtime defaults, and tracked test fixtures free of operator-specific repository names, absolute local paths, private skill inventories, and private service URLs. Private evidence and operator runbooks belong in the private skillbox-config repo.
